name: local-audio-plus
description: Transcribe local audio files referenced in notes using OpenAI, Tencent Cloud ASR, or iFlytek ASR.

scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=require('./package.json'); const manifest=require('./manifest.json'); manifest.version=pkg.version; fs.writeFileSync('manifest.json', JSON.stringify(manifest,null,2)+'\n');"

author: linziyan
